metadata.name: Create A/B Test for an Email Campaign

description: A marketing manager wants to test two different subject lines for an upcoming promotional email to see which one gets a higher open rate.

nodes.task_description: Set up a new email campaign in the marketing platform.

expected_outcome.value: The manager begins creating the new campaign.

nodes.task_description: Select the 'A/B Test' option and enter two different subject lines (Version A and Version B).

expected_outcome.value: The manager configures the A/B test with the two variations.

nodes.task_description: Launch the campaign. The system will send Version A to a small portion of the audience and Version B to another small portion. After a set time, it will automatically send the winning version to the rest of the audience.

expected_outcome.value: An A/B test is executed to optimize the campaign's performance.
